cases.description: The setProtocolFee function lacks access control, allowing any user to modify the protocol fee.
attack_steps: 1. Attacker calls setProtocolFee with arbitrary value
2. Protocol fee is changed without authorization
cases.fix_recommendation: Add onlyOwner modifier to setProtocolFee function

cases.description: The mint function has no access control, allowing anyone to mint tokens.
cases.fix_recommendation: Add access control: require(msg.sender == admin, 'Not admin')
